news.title:
NCLAT to hear appeal against approval of Oberoi Realty's Rs 919 crore bid.
Bench directed not to create equity for successful resolution applicants during the appeal.
news.summary:
NCLAT to hear appeal against approval of Oberoi Realty's Rs 919 crore bid.
Bench directed not to create equity for successful resolution applicants during the appeal.

news.title:
Top realty developers reported stable to healthy Q3FY26 earnings despite Labour Code compliance costs.
Companies like Prestige Estates, Lodha, Oberoi, DLF, and Godrej Properties navigated the challenges effectively.
news.summary:
Top realty developers reported stable to healthy Q3FY26 earnings despite Labour Code compliance costs.

news.title:
Oberoi Realty JV partners with Aman Group for luxury Worli project.
JV I Ven Realty signs agreements for hotel, residences with Aman Group.
news.summary:

news.title:
NCLT approves Hotel Horizon's acquisition by Oberoi Realty-led consortium.
The bid offers Rs 919 crore for Rs 1,293 crore liabilities, ensuring 74% lender recovery.
news.summary:
NCLT approves Hotel Horizon's acquisition by Oberoi Realty-led consortium.
The bid offers Rs 919 crore for Rs 1,293 crore liabilities, ensuring 74% lender recovery.

news.title:
Oberoi Realty bids ₹5,400 crore to RLDA for Bandra East land development.
The bid includes initial payments and ongoing revenue-sharing agreements.
news.summary:
Oberoi Realty bids ₹5,400 crore to RLDA for Bandra East land development.
The bid includes initial payments and ongoing revenue-sharing agreements.

news.title:
Oberoi Realty's ₹5,400 Cr bid is highest for 11-acre Mumbai railway land, with a 99-year lease tenure.
The land offers ~19.5 lakh sq. ft. FSI; awaiting Railway Land Development Authority's next steps.
news.summary:
Oberoi Realty's ₹5,400 Cr bid is highest for 11-acre Mumbai railway land, with a 99-year lease tenure.
The land offers ~19.5 lakh sq. ft. FSI; awaiting Railway Land Development Authority's next steps.

news.title:
Oberoi Realty announces analyst/investor meets for Feb 2026 in Mumbai.
Meetings include events by Nuvama, Axis Capital, and Kotak Securities.
news.summary:
Oberoi Realty announces analyst/investor meets for Feb 2026 in Mumbai.

news.title:
Oberoi Realty acquired 100% of Hotel Horizon Pvt Ltd via NCLT plan.
The deal involved Rs. 919.3 Cr payment for prime Mumbai land.
news.summary:
Oberoi Realty acquired 100% of Hotel Horizon Pvt Ltd via NCLT plan.

news.title:
Oberoi Realty confirmed payment of Rs. 10.1 Cr and Rs. 12.2 Cr interest on NCDs.
The payments were made on the due date, January 27, 2026, as per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:

Oberoi Realty saw a block trade of ~503,696 shares at Rs. 1475.1.
The total trade value for Oberoi Realty amounted to Rs. 74.3 crores.

news.title:
Oberoi Realty delays project launches to Q4 FY26 and Q1 FY27, focusing on product design.
The company finalized a development deal for Nepean Sea Road; groundbreaking in nine months.

Oberoi Realty uploaded Q3FY26 results and business updates audio on its website.
The conference call recording is available under Investors > Financial Results section.

news.title:
Oberoi Realty plans significant project launches in FY27, focusing on Mumbai.
The company eyes expansion in the NCR region alongside Mumbai projects.
news.summary:
Oberoi Realty plans significant project launches in FY27, focusing on Mumbai.

news.title:
Oberoi Realty fell 8% to a 9-month low as traders reviewed Q3 results.
The stock led losses in the Nifty Realty index amid sector-wide weakness.

news.title:
LTIMindtree, Tata Capital, Adani Power, CEAT, Oberoi Realty, and Sai Silks report mixed Q3 FY26 results.
Adani Power wins NCLAT approval for ₹4,000 cr Vidarbha plan; CEAT posts 60.3% net profit rise YoY.
news.summary:
LTIMindtree, Tata Capital, Adani Power, CEAT, Oberoi Realty, and Sai Silks report mixed Q3 FY26 results.
Adani Power wins NCLAT approval for ₹4,000 cr Vidarbha plan; CEAT posts 60.3% net profit rise YoY.

news.title:
Oberoi Realty announces a dividend of ₹2/share, showcasing financial stability.
The move highlights the company's commitment to enhancing shareholder returns.
news.summary:
Oberoi Realty announces a dividend of ₹2/share, showcasing financial stability.
The move highlights the company's commitment to enhancing shareholder returns.

news.title:
Oberoi Realty's Q3 net profit rose 0.7% to ₹622.6 crore, revenue grew 5.8% to ₹1,492.6 crore.
EBITDA remained steady at ₹856 crore, while margins declined to 57.4% from 60.7% YoY.
news.summary:
Oberoi Realty's Q3 net profit rose 0.7% to ₹622.6 crore, revenue grew 5.8% to ₹1,492.6 crore.
EBITDA remained steady at ₹856 crore, while margins declined to 57.4% from 60.7% YoY.

news.title:
Nifty Realty index dropped 1.08% to 848.7, marking a 7.85% decline over 7 sessions.
Stock moves: Signatureglobal fell 2.1%, Macrotech 1.8%, Brigade 1.5%, Anant Raj 1.4%, Prestige 1.3%.
news.summary:
Nifty Realty index dropped 1.08% to 848.7, marking a 7.85% decline over 7 sessions.
Stock moves: Signatureglobal fell 2.1%, Macrotech 1.8%, Brigade 1.5%, Anant Raj 1.4%, Prestige 1.3%.

news.title:
Oberoi Realty to hold board meeting on Jan 19, 2026, for Q3 FY25-26 results.
Board to consider 3rd interim dividend declaration for FY25-26 and decide record date.
news.summary:
Oberoi Realty to hold board meeting on Jan 19, 2026, for Q3 FY25-26 results.
Board to consider 3rd interim dividend declaration for FY25-26 and decide record date.

news.title:
Shree Naman Group and Oberoi Realty top bids for 11-acre Bandra railway plot worth Rs 5,365 crore.
Winning bidder to develop mixed-use property, sharing 45% revenue; site offers 1.9-2m sq ft developable area.
news.summary:
Shree Naman Group and Oberoi Realty top bids for 11-acre Bandra railway plot worth Rs 5,365 crore.
Winning bidder to develop mixed-use property, sharing 45% revenue; site offers 1.9-2m sq ft developable area.
